There is plenty of sweet water in a place which has Muflja
grass, reeds and sacrificial grass, where the earth is blue and mixed
with pebbles, and where the earth is black or red.

A copper-coloured earth mixed with gravel will yield water
of astringent taste; red-brown earth makes the water brackish; a
pale white earth produces salt-water;'and blue earth, sweet water.
